subject: Zoom sign-in button grayed out
description: User opens Zoom; cannot click Sign In; SSO path unavailable from UI.

ts_steps.title: Window size
ts_steps.action: Maximize Zoom; fix HiDPI scaling test 100% temporarily.

ts_steps.title: Standard user
ts_steps.action: Do not run Zoom as admin daily — test non-elevated.

ts_steps.title: Credential Manager
ts_steps.action: Remove stale zoom.us and IdP entries.

ts_steps.title: WebView2 runtime
ts_steps.action: Repair Edge WebView2 if SSO webview blank.

ts_steps.title: Policy compare
ts_steps.action: Registry Zoom policy keys vs working PC.

internal_information: Corrupt UI, WebView2, policy lock, scaling clip, stale creds.
